pr_title: Fix inverted max_price filtering in flight search
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix the flight search max_price filter so results include flights priced at or below the requested maximum instead of flights above it.

## What changed
- Corrected the max_price comparison in `backend/app/services/flight_service.py`
- Added/updated tests for max_price boundary behavior and non-regression coverage

## Validation
- Verified flights at `max_price` are included
- Verified flights above `max_price` are excluded
- Confirmed other search filters remain unchanged

## Notes
This is a localized backend fix for the search service implementation.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
